docs.text: Welcome to Yuyang Jin's Homepage 大家好！我是金煜阳，我的老婆是范诗雨 要做一个猛男！要猛！ Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
